claim_text: Ray Kurzweil predicts Longevity Escape Velocity for 2032. Peter Diamandis wore a T-shirt with the words LEV -2033 at a recent summit with David Sinclair. By 2050 we may encounter truly Age Reversal Technologies. Will this be true immortality? LEV procedures may buy us additional time to survive the 2030s and 2040s in the best possible condition.
